vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is largely unsupported by the visual evidence. P1 (String of Nickels) and P2 (Mexican Mint) are not visible as distinct specimens. P3 (Pothos) and P4 (Silver Guest) are absent or have suffered total systemic loss.

inventory_reconciliation.P1: Systemic Loss: No foliage detected in yellow pot.
inventory_reconciliation.P2: Systemic Loss: No foliage detected in black pot.
inventory_reconciliation.P3: Systemic Loss: White rabbit anchor remains, but Pothos is absent.
inventory_reconciliation.P4: Systemic Loss: No foliage detected in black pot.
inventory_reconciliation.New_Introduction: None. The environment is currently devoid of identifiable plant life.

plant_audit.P1_Yellow_Pot: Empty soil surface; no signs of life.
plant_audit.P2_Black_Pot: Empty soil surface; no signs of life.
plant_audit.P3_Black_Pot: White rabbit anchor present; soil is bare.
plant_audit.P4_Black_Pot: Empty soil surface; no signs of life.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Appears consistently dark and potentially desiccated or overly saturated; no visible fungal growth or moss.
biome_observations.desk_surface: Clean, no debris or organic matter detected.

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_t-4: Initial state shows a single green sprout in the foreground black pot.
temporal_deltas.t-4_to_t-1: The green sprout exhibits signs of chlorosis and postural collapse, eventually disappearing.
temporal_deltas.t-1_to_current: Total loss of all vegetative matter. The biome is now completely barren.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome has experienced a total collapse. The specimen previously observed in the foreground pot has undergone senescence and likely decomposition, leaving the pots empty.
vision_report.anomalies: The primary anomaly is the complete absence of the registered plants, suggesting either total mortality or removal of the specimens.
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit reveals a critical failure of the indoor botanical environment. Starting from a state where a single, struggling sprout was visible, the sequence documents a steady decline leading to the current state of total systemic loss. No plants remain in any of the registered pots. The white rabbit anchor remains as the only non-biological constant in the scene.
